name: triage-queue-row
title: Triage Queue Row
description: One waiting patient with identity, triage level, chief complaint, and an escalating wait chip.

props.name: complaint
props.description: Chief complaint, truncated to one line.

props.name: targetMinutes
props.description: Per-level wait target; the chip escalates as it is approached and breached.

clinicalNotes: Waiting-time targets differ per acuity level (e.g. MTS level 2 = 10 min, level 3 = 60 min), so the target is a prop and never assumed — the wait chip escalates neutral → warning (≥75% of target) → destructive breach (≥target), and the breach state is announced to screen readers, not conveyed by color alone. The row is built to stay legible on a wallboard at distance. Acuity classification and target policy are the caller's; this is presentation only.
notes: medcn-original. Composes triage-level-indicator + avatar + badge; per-level target drives the wait-chip tone.
